subject: GO: Nebulous P8 Slice B review
body: Torrid read-only GO for Nebulous Slice B on exact requested paths only: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/controller.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. Evidence: focused proof is green and quiet, pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools exec vitest run tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts => 6 tests passed with no visible React/Ink act warning. Interaction proof is behaviour-shaped enough for this slice: focus cycle is covered by nextCollaborationTuiPane, scroll bounds by scrollCollaborationTuiOffsets against snapshot row counts, refresh failure preserves the last good snapshot, and stale refresh failure cannot overwrite a newer success. Production change bounds offsets in controller state rather than only relying on render-time visible() clamping. Report language in shared comms says P8-A2 advanced and explicitly does not claim P8 complete. No edits, no claim, no git/index activity from me.
